use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF PRIMARY BILIARY CHOLANGITIS (PBC) IN COMBINATION WITH URSODEOXYCHOLIC ACID (UDCA) IN ADULTS WHO HAVE HAD AN INADEQUATE RESPONSE TO UDCA, OR AS MONOTHERAPY IN PATIENTS UNABLE TO TOLERATE UDCA
